tasks.description: Add MarkRunning method to MinionStore using transaction-based status constraint enforcement (matching SetClarification pattern)
steps: MarkRunning(ctx, id, podName) method exists on MinionStore
Uses transaction with FOR UPDATE row lock (pattern: minions.go:599-639)
Enforces transition from 'pending' only, returns ErrInvalidStatusTransition otherwise
Updates status='running', pod_name, started_at=NOW(), last_activity_at=NOW()
Returns ErrNotFound if minion doesn't exist

tasks.description: Create spawner component with background goroutine that polls for pending minions
steps: Spawner struct exists in orchestrator/internal/spawner/spawner.go
Follows watchdog pattern: ticker, stop channel, graceful shutdown
Start() method launches background goroutine
Stop() method signals shutdown and waits for completion
Polls every 5 seconds for pending minions

tasks.description: Spawner generates GitHub App installation token for minion repo
steps: Spawner calls token manager to generate installation token
Token is passed to SpawnParams for pod creation
Token generation failure marks minion as failed with clear error message

tasks.description: Spawner calls SpawnPodWithRetry and WaitForPodReady to create pods
steps: Spawner calls SpawnPodWithRetry() with correct SpawnParams
SpawnParams includes OrchestratorURL and InternalAPIToken
Waits for pod readiness via WaitForPodReady()
Pod spawn failure (after retries exhausted) marks minion as failed

tasks.description: Spawner updates minion status after successful pod spawn
steps: Calls MarkRunning(id, podName) after pod is ready
Minion transitions from pending to running with pod_name set
MarkRunning DB failures log error but don't crash spawner

tasks.description: Spawner initiates SSE streaming after successful spawn
steps: After successful spawn, initiates SSE connection to pod
Uses existing streaming.SSEClient infrastructure
SSE connection failures are non-fatal; client retries automatically

tasks.description: Spawner handles errors gracefully with proper status transitions
steps: GitHub token failures mark minion as failed
Pod readiness timeout marks minion as failed
Error messages are captured in minion error field
Spawner continues processing other minions after a failure
Handles edge cases: concurrent spawn (transaction prevents), already running (ErrInvalidStatusTransition), pod name collision (k8s error)

tasks.description: Initialize GitHub token manager in main.go
steps: Load GITHUB_APP_ID and GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY env vars with validation
Parse app ID to int64
Call github.NewManager() with config
Handle initialization errors with structured logging
Token manager available for spawner injection

tasks.description: Initialize SSE client dependencies in main.go for spawner
steps: Create EventStore instance from pool
Create DBEventHandler with EventStore, MinionStore, and Hub
Create SSEClient with PodManager, EventHandler, and config (port 4096)
SSEClient available for spawner injection

tasks.description: Wire spawner into orchestrator main.go startup/shutdown lifecycle
steps: Initialize spawner with tokenManager, sseClient, stores, podManager
Spawner.Start() called after reconciliation, before watchdog
Spawner.Stop() called during shutdown after watchdog
Structured logs capture startup and shutdown events
Test spawner processes pending minions
Test spawner skips non-pending minions
Test spawner handles token generation failure
Test spawner handles pod spawn failure
Test spawner stops cleanly on shutdown signal
Test MarkRunning updates status, pod_name, started_at, last_activity_at
Test MarkRunning only transitions from pending status (returns ErrInvalidStatusTransition)
Test MarkRunning returns ErrNotFound for non-existent minion
Test MarkRunning uses transaction to prevent concurrent updates

nonGoals: Horizontal scaling / locking (single replica for now)
Concurrent spawning (process serially to avoid k8s API rate limits)
Priority queue (FIFO by created_at is sufficient)
Spawner crash recovery in reconciler (separate enhancement)
